title: Sign in on mobile with valid credentials
description: A mobile user can authenticate with email and password and reach the authenticated home experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated mobile experience is displayed
Verify the mobile home screen is visible

title: Sign in and reach the admin dashboard
description: This verifies an admin can sign in with valid credentials and land on the protected dashboard home.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify dashboard statistics are visible

title: Complete a trip booking
description: A mobile rider can review trip options, submit a booking request, and see a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the mobile user credentials
Submit the login form
Navigate to /booking
Review the available booking options
Select valid trip details
Submit the booking request
Verify a booking confirmation is visible

title: Complete a trip payment
description: A mobile rider can review payment details, submit payment information, and see a payment confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the mobile user credentials
Submit the login form
Navigate to /payment
Review the payment details
Enter valid payment information
Submit the payment
Verify a payment confirmation is visible

title: Submit license activation
description: This verifies that a signed-in mobile user can enter license information and submit it to start activation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the mobile user credentials into the login form
Submit the login form
Click the navigation control for license activation
Fill in valid license information into the license form
Submit the activation form
Verify activation status is displayed

title: Block access to the admin dashboard without signing in
description: This verifies a visitor who is not signed in is prevented from viewing the protected admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the protected dashboard is not displayed

title: Reach the authenticated mobile home screen

Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated mobile home screen is displayed
Verify the primary tab sections are visible

title: View activation success state

Submit the login form

title: Prevent access to driver management without signing in
description: This verifies the driver management page is protected and redirects unauthenticated visitors to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /drivers
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the driver list is not displayed

title: Keep required license fields empty until completed

Fill in the mobile user credentials into the login form

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the mobile user credentials
Submit the login form
Navigate to /booking
Submit the booking request without completing the required trip details
Verify a booking validation error is visible
